name: Oak Valley Bancorp
business: Oak Valley Bancorp provides commercial banking services to individuals and small to medium-sized businesses primarily in the Central Valley and Eastern Sierras of California through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Oak Valley Community Bank. The Bank offers checking and savings accounts, commercial and real estate loans, lines of credit, and other services such as online banking and mobile banking. Approximately 99% of its loans and 90% of its deposits are generated from the Central Valley area.
